source_pr.title: plan: new plan support hash aggregation.
source_pr.body:
Now we only support hash aggregation.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala @tiancaiamao PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select sum(e) as k, avg(b + c) from t where c = 1 and b = 1 and e = 1 group by d order by k", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select sum(e) as k, avg(b + c) from t where c = 1 and b = 1 and e = 1 group by d order by k", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select sum(e) as k, avg(b + c) from t where c = 1 and b = 1 and e = 1 group by d order by k", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
